text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > Single Room Occupancy Housing 1 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF TRANSITION PROJECTS ARGYLE GARDENS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers 72 affordable housing units. 650 NW Irving Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Low income individuals Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (503) 280-4700 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TRANSITION PROJECTS BARBARA MAHER APARTMENTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 32 unit sober residential housing program. 650 NW Irving Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Individuals age 18 and older who identify as female, experiencing homelessness, and are in recovery from substance use disorder issues. Individuals must be alcohol and drug-free before entry. Hours: Residential Program: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Resource Center (in person or phone): Monday-Friday 8:30am-7pm, Saturday/Sunday/all holidays 8:30am-3pm; service intakes end 15 minutes before close (503) 280-4700 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TRANSITION PROJECTS ARGYLE GARDENS
